blended.narrative: Fernie Alpine Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,374 ft. Looking ahead, 29 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 4" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
